rules.name: Same-day transaction cluster
rules.description_template: Instruments {a} and {b} were recorded on {date}. Shared parties suggest a linked transaction (e.g., purchase-money DOT).
rules.examiner_action_template: No action — grouping is informational. Confirm the DOT secures the same-day deed.

rules.name: Open DOT past expected release window
rules.title_template: Open lien older than typical residential term
rules.description_template: DOT {a} recorded {date} (lifecycle {lc}) remains open after {years} years. Typical residential refinance or payoff would have generated a release by now.
rules.examiner_action_template: Request payoff from current beneficiary. Verify lifecycle against the county's internal cross-parcel name search.

rules.name: MERS-as-nominee beneficiary
rules.title_template: MERS beneficiary — note may have transferred outside public record
rules.description_template: DOT {a} names MERS as beneficiary as nominee for {lender}. Release was executed by {releaser}, not {lender} directly. The note may have transferred via MERS outside the public record.
rules.examiner_action_template: Confirm chain of custody for the note via MERS Milestone Report or direct payoff request. Assignment may be unrecorded.

rules.name: Assignment chain break
rules.title_template: Release by entity other than original beneficiary
rules.description_template: DOT {a} originated with {originator} as beneficiary. Release {b} executed by {releaser}. No recorded assignment bridges the two.
rules.examiner_action_template: Request assignment documentation or accept MERS transfer. Flag for title-policy exception if unresolved.

rules.name: Grantor is trust entity
rules.description_template: Deed {a} conveys from {trust_name}. Trust conveyances require verification of trustee authority.
rules.examiner_action_template: Obtain trust certification or certificate of trust. Verify trustee signed in representative capacity.

rules.name: Root plat unrecoverable via public API
rules.title_template: Parent plat not recoverable via public API
rules.description_template: Subdivision plat {a} references parent plat {parent_ref} which is not retrievable through the Maricopa public API. See hunt log at docs/hunt-log-known-gap-2.md.
rules.examiner_action_template: Legal description is adequate for commitment purposes. Parent-plat reference preserved for chain audit.

rules.name: Same-name contamination suppressed
rules.title_template: Same-name instruments suppressed by parcel attribution
rules.description_template: {count} instrument(s) returned by public name search matched parcel owner name but did not satisfy parcel-attribution rules (Decision #26). Suppressed from chain.
rules.examiner_action_template: No action — curator confirmed these belong to other parcels owned by same party.

rules.name: Chain stale
rules.title_template: Chain shows no activity for {years} years
rules.description_template: Last recorded instrument for parcel {apn} was on {last_date}. Typical residential parcels see refinance or sale activity every 5–10 years.
rules.examiner_action_template: Not a defect. Verify current ownership has not changed by confirming assessor record matches last deed grantee.
